log_snapshot.scope: complete server log through the final 30K context case and last pre-stop health check

oom_event_fields.interpretation: These are repeated zero-valued cgroup telemetry fields, not OOM events.

generic_skipped.interpretation: Every generic skipped line is an expected persistent-quantization boot fast path; none reports a serving replay or gate failure.

memory_watchdog.interpretation: The quality and context lane stayed above its hard fail-closed floor with no swap, hard-limit, or OOM event. File-cache growth briefly crossed memory.high and caused observable soft reclaim and pressure; those events are not reported as zero.

kpi_semantics.window_boundary: base_fp_residue_steps is the count in the latest 64-step KPI window, not a cumulative counter.
kpi_semantics.residue_boundary: Residue records second-order misses exposed after the mandatory first-order fetch and replay. Under the throughput-oriented default, those experts are fetched for later steps while their current-step contribution remains zero.
kpi_semantics.unrestored_boundary: Zero unrestored experts establishes fetch/store liveness. It does not establish a miss-free forward, bit-identical logits, or identical token streams across boots.
kpi_semantics.policy_boundary: The final quality policy observed residue and replay but did not reject on either metric. A separate strict zero-residue diagnostic failed before scoring.

sanitization_note: Topology-specific and private runtime provenance identifiers are intentionally omitted.
